name: Optimize Sequential Tokenization to Batched
description: This function tokenizes a list of texts one by one in a loop, which is extremely slow for large inputs. Rewrite it to use batched tokenization in a single call WITHOUT padding. Return a plain Python list of input_id lists (no numpy arrays, no nesting). Each inner list contains the token IDs for one text. Function must be named 'solution'.
broken_code:
from transformers import AutoTokenizer

def solution(texts: list) -> list:
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('distilbert-base-uncased')
    results = []
    for text in texts:
        tokens = tokenizer(text)
        results.append(tokens['input_ids'])
    return results
